user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new time off adjustment approver, so that leave balance adjustments are routed to the correct approver by location.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Adjustment Approvers screen; When I click Add new time off adjustment approver and select locations and approvers; Then the mapping is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view adjustment approvers by location and approver, so that I can verify routing for balance adjustments.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Adjustment Approvers screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Location(s) and Approver(s) columns for each mapping

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing adjustment approver mapping, so that I can update the approver or covered locations.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Adjustment Approvers screen; When I click Edit on a mapping row and change its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the adjustment approvers list, so that I can navigate all configured mappings.
acceptance_criteria: Given the adjustment approvers list has multiple pages; When I click Next; Then the next page of mappings is displayed
